creator: freebsd@otoh.org
text:
Created attachment 237309
Fix external downloads and cleanup

Here's the full patch.

Push GH_TUPLE= out to a separate file (Makefile.gh_tuple) so it can be fully generated and generate it
Cleanup BAZEL_ARGS so it's not repetitive.
Always apply patch-third_party_repo.bzl

This builds without external download on my system. I'd appreciate someone else giving it a go as there's been some oddities in the past.

Here's the start of the build on my system. As you can see, no issues with closure:
